channel.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Jun 14th, 2021
item.description:
Algorithms and Data structures

  • crystalgstars31 - A Generic Algorithm Library

    • CLI Utils

  • oqstars137 - A performant, and portable jq wrapper to facilitate the consumption and output of formats other than JSON; using jqstars19.4k filters to transform the data

    • Database Tools

  • queryitstars16 - A setupless terminal based SQL query runner

    • Dependency Injection

  • HardWirestars15 - A compile-time non-intrusive dependency injection system

    • Framework Components

  • mochistars19 - Authentication shard inspired by Devise supporting: Authenticable, Confirmable, Invitable & more
  • motion.crstars39 - Object oriented frontend library for Amber
  • tourmalinestars95 - Telegram bot framework with an API loosely based on telegraf.js

    • Misc

  • burocracia.crstars21 - burocracia.cr the dependecyless shard to validate, generate and format Brazilian burocracias such as CPF, CNPJ and CEP

    • ORM/ODM Extensions

  • avramstars112 - A database wrapper for reading, writing, and migrating Postgres databases

    • Queues and Messaging

  • mosquitostars151 - Redis backed periodic and ad hoc job processing

    • Serverless Computing

  • FaaStRuby - Serverless Software Development Platform for Ruby and Crystal
  • secrets-envstars6 - Extends ENV module to read values injected by docker / kubernetes secrets and other orchestration tools

    • Third-party APIs

  • mollie.crstars12 - Mollie Payments API wrapper (Creditcard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Sofort, Klarna, ...)

    • LSP Language Server Protocol Implementations

  • crystallinestars153 - Crystalline is an implementation of the Language Server Protocol written in and for the Crystal Language

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal May 27th, 2021
item.description:
Compression

  • Gzip - readers and writers of gzip format (Crystal stdlib)
  • Zip - readers and writers of zip format (Crystal stdlib)
  • Zlib - readers and writers of zlib format (Crystal stdlib)

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 24th, 2021
item.description:
CLI Utils

  • coinstars6 - Command-line application that performs currency conversion via the Fixer API

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Debugging

  • backtracer.crstars3 - Shard aiming to assist with parsing backtraces into a structured form
  • debug.crstars76 - debug!(…) macro for pp-style debugging

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • splay_tree_mapstars5 - Splay Tree implementation that conforms to the Hash ducktype

    • Misc

  • serf-handler.crstars0 - Framework for building Serf handlers, with a suite of useful builtin capabilities

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 21st, 2021
item.description:
Network Protocols

  • stompstars0 - STOMP protocol

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 12th, 2021
item.description:
Algorithms and Data structures

  • s2_cellsstars0 - S2 Geometry for spatial indexing

    • HTTP

  • link-headerstars0 - HTTP Link Header Parser

item.description:
Editor Plugins

    • acmecrystalstars3 - Reformats crystal code in acme

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Feb 27th, 2021
item.description:
Misc

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Feb 1st, 2021
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Mar 30th, 2020
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • mxnet.crstars10 - Bindings for MXNet

    • Misc

  • iterm2stars4 - Display images within the terminal using the ITerm2 Inline Images Protocol

    • Science and Data analysis

  • ishistars36 - Graph plotting package with a small API and sensible defaults powered by gnuplot

    • Third-party APIs

  • host_metastars2 - A Web Host Metadata (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6415) client
  • web_fingerstars7 - A WebFinger (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7033) client

    • Tools

  • public_suffixstars1 - A small library designed to make the Public Suffix List (https://publicsuffix.org/) easier to use

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Mar 6th, 2018
item.description:
CLI Builders

  • OptionParser - command-line options processing (Crystal stdlib)

    • Data Formats

  • CSV - parsing and generating for comma-separated values (Crystal stdlib)
  • INI - INI file parser (Crystal stdlib)
  • JSON - parsing and generating JSON documents (Crystal stdlib)
  • XML - parsing and generating XML documents (Crystal stdlib)
  • YAML - parsing and generating YAML documents (Crystal stdlib)

    • HTTP

  • HTTP::Client - HTTP client (Crystal stdlib)
  • HTTP::Server - HTTP server (Crystal stdlib)
  • HTTP::WebSocket - HTTP WebSocket client (Crystal stdlib)

    • Network Protocols

  • OAuth - OAuth consumer (Crystal stdlib)
  • OAuth2 - OAuth2 client (Crystal stdlib)
  • OpenSSL - bindings to libssl (Crystal stdlib)

    • Networking

  • ipaddress.crstars36 - Library to handle IPv4 and IPv6 addresses

    • Template Engine

  • ECR (Embedded Crystal) - compile time template language which uses plain crystal expressions (Crystal stdlib)

    • Testing

  • Spec - spec framework (Crystal stdlib)

item.description:

  • twitter-crystalstars80 - A library to access the Twitter API
